title: Product sync — 2026-01-19
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-01-19
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Acme Robotics escalated User Management & SSO problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Slack integration' across accounts.
- Eng notes User Management & SSO generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Slack integration' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate User Management & SSO performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Acme Robotics.
